subject: SEO Update — ARLO — 2026-07-16
html:
PageWhat ChangedTarget KeywordCheck It
/connect/youtube-mcpNew connector landing page (4th in the matrix, after GA4/Google Ads/Search Console) — 3-step OAuth setup, real metrics/dimensions pulled from the live YouTube Analytics connector, 5 example prompts, FAQ + HowTo schema. Cross-linked from the GA4 and Search Console pages so it's not an orphan.youtube mcp / youtube analytics mcp / connect youtube to claudeaskarlo.app/connect/youtube-mcp
public/llms.txtAdded the new page to the AI-crawler page list.—askarlo.app/llms.txt

Note: checked live SE Ranking data first — "youtube mcp" and close variants currently show no measurable US search volume. Shipped anyway to complete the 6-source connector matrix (GA4, Search Console, Google Ads, YouTube now live; Meta Ads still blocked on a launch-status confirmation) ahead of the MCP-adoption growth curve, same rationale used for the Search Console page.

Next: Meta Ads connector page is blocked on confirming real launch status (product owner decision needed). The connector/comparison clusters are otherwise fully shipped, so the next content push shifts to the 12-post blog plan. A /compare index page and static-rendering the marketing pages remain open, lower-risk items worth a dedicated session each.
